title: User
description: A Slack user object representing a workspace member with their profile, roles, and settings.

id.description: The unique identifier for this user.

team_id.description: The workspace team ID this user belongs to.

deleted.description: Whether the user has been deactivated.

color.description: A hex color code used in certain client displays for this user.

tz_label.description: Descriptive label for the user's timezone.

tz_offset.description: The user's timezone offset from UTC in seconds.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is a workspace admin.

is_owner.description: Whether the user is a workspace owner.

is_primary_owner.description: Whether the user is the primary workspace owner.

is_restricted.description: Whether the user is a guest with single-channel access.

is_ultra_restricted.description: Whether the user is a single-channel guest.

is_bot.description: Whether the user is a bot.

is_app_user.description: Whether the user is an app user.

updated.description: Unix timestamp of when the user was last updated.

has_2fa.description: Whether the user has two-factor authentication enabled.

locale.description: IETF language code for the user. Only included when specifically requested.
